mapper.select: select ii.id, ii.inbound_id, ii.arrival_item_id, ai.order_item_id, ii.material_id, ii.material_code, ii.material_name, ii.specification, ii.unit, ii.inbound_number, ii.sort_number, ii.remark, ii.create_time, ii.update_time, ii.deleted from inbound_item ii left join arrival_item ai on ii.arrival_item_id = ai.id where ii.inbound_id = #{inboundId} and ii.deleted = 0 order by ii.sort_number asc, ii.id asc
